name: memory-systems
description: > Guides implementation of agent memory systems, compares production frameworks (Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Letta, LangMem, Cognee), and designs persistence architectures for cross-session knowledge retention. Use when the user asks to "implement agent memory", "persist state across sessions", "build knowledge graph for agents", "track entities over time", "add long-term memory", "choose a memory framework", or mentions temporal knowledge graphs, vector stores, entity memory, adaptive memory, dynamic m
author: muratcankoylan
